name: Mascot
description: Mascot is a small community in northeastern Knox County, tucked between Corryton and Strawberry Plains along Strawberry Plains Pike. Tristar Locksmith serves Mascot homeowners and motorists with reliable locksmith response, including car lockouts, home lock changes, and rekey services. We are one of the few local locksmiths willing to travel to smaller Knox County communities without extra mileage fees.
